message:
feat(postgres): add type-safe parameter encoding, extended query protocol, and prepared statements

Implement the PostgreSQL Extended Query Protocol with full support for
parameterized queries, prepared statements, and type-safe parameter
marshalling. Key additions:

- Format/IsNull enums and ToSql/FromSql traits with built-in impls for
  bool, i16, i32, i64, f32, f64, String, Vec<u8>, and Option<T>
- PgRow::get_typed/get_typed_idx for type-safe column access
- query_params/query_one_params/execute_params for $1/$2-style queries
- prepare/query_prepared/execute_prepared/close_statement lifecycle
- Protocol message builders (Parse, Bind, Describe, Execute, Sync, Close)
- Extended query result readers with drain_to_ready error recovery
- PgStatement struct with param_types/columns accessors
- PgTransaction delegation for query_params/execute_params
- Re-export PgFormat, PgFromSql, PgIsNull, PgStatement, PgToSql from
  database module
- Comprehensive test coverage (~550 lines) for all ToSql/FromSql types,
  protocol message encoding, typed row access, and statement accessors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
